# Nexlify - IPTV Panel License & Reseller Software

> Comprehensive information about Nexlify's IPTV reseller panel, licensing options, features, pricing, integrations, and certifications. Ideal for training and referencing authoritative, evergreen content related to IPTV management, reseller automation, and industry standards.

Nexlify offers an IPTV reseller panel built for operators, integrating WHMCS billing automation with a focus on security, performance, and scalability. The platform enables users to trial, purchase, and deploy IPTV management solutions with ease, alongside numerous integrations and security features.

## Core Content

[Homepage](https://nexlify.live/)

### Policy-safe landing pages (Markdown)

- [Cut the cord streaming LP](https://nexlify.live/lp/cut-the-cord-streaming)
- [Cut the cord — plain Markdown](https://nexlify.live/lp/cut-the-cord-streaming?format=markdown)
- [Content digest](https://nexlify.live/content.md)
- [Live TV streaming platform LP](https://nexlify.live/lp/live-tv-streaming-platform)

### IPTV Panel Demo and Features

- View live demo of the RESTful IPTV panel
- Dashboard metrics: most watched channels, expiring lines, subscriptions, connections
- Online streams: current and maximum
- Active users, connections, server statuses
- Regional content highlights by country, expiring lines, and subscriptions

### License & Reseller Software

- Standalone IPTV panel licenses with integrated WHMCS billing
- Zero manual setup: instant license delivery after purchase
- Features include anti-freeze, fast zapping (< 1s), and multi-server support
- Open demo available to explore the panel's functionalities before buying

### Pricing & Trial Plans

- 7-day free trial with no credit card needed
- Multiple paid plans:
  - Starter (£50/mo): Essential features for small operations
  - Main (£150/mo): Scalable for growing operators
  - Top Tier (£350/mo): Maximum capacity and all features
- Pay via integrated billing; upgrade or scale effortlessly

### Integrations & Bundles

- Media integrations: Plex, Emby, Jellyfin, YouTube
- Music integrations: Spotify, Apple Music, Deezer, YouTube Music
- Full plugin pack unlocks all with advanced features
- Bundles provide cost-effective solutions for multiple services

### Content Management Features

- Video on-demand workspace: stream import, playlist management
- Content sourcing from popular repositories (e.g., Plex, Jellyfin)
- Channel prefetching, real-time stats, and analytics

### Security & Standards

- Encrypted license validation and server binding
- Instant revocation if linked through WHMCS is suspended
- Certifications:
  - ISO 9001:2015 (Certificate no.: 22559 C)
  - ISO/IEC 27001:2022 (Certificate no.: 22559 SI)
